$schema_note: Phase-1 CHARACTER SPEC (canonical identity lock) for character2d. Referenced by Phases 3-8. Restored to the repo and reconciled with the Phase-0 pixel validation (watch side corrected; height A2 resolved).

A2_height.evidence: Phase-0 pixel measurement: figure 2398px, head 311px -> 7.71 HH; supports the 7.75 default over 8.0. Locking 7.75 HH; body-language/gesture amplitude calibration now unblocked.

watch_side.evidence: Front: watch viewer-right; Back: watch viewer-left -> a left-side item (verified via zoomed wrist crops on all 4 plates). Overrides the original blueprint's character-right.

A1_right_plate.note: No clean orthographic RIGHT profile (side_left is a right-facing profile, side_right a left-facing 3/4; plates are AI-generated and not rigidly orthographic). Right-side meshes/rig/gestures mirror the observed left and are flagged for repaint if a true right plate arrives.

2_jaw.v: soft-tapered V, rounded chin, obtuse gonial angle

3_hair_silhouette.v: spiky-layered, crown loft, bangs to brow; outline sacred

5_hair_direction.v: radial from rear-crown whorl; bangs forward+outward

8_nose.v: minimal shadow accent + small tip, near-rigid

17_shirt_fit.v: relaxed crew tee, sleeves pushed to below elbow (bare forearms, all 4 plates), slight hem blouse

20_lighting.v: soft top-front key, low contrast, white bg

21_line_style.v: clean medium weight, dark warm-brown (not pure black)

23_material_response.v: matte fabric, semi-matte sneaker, low-gloss watch

24_wrinkle_map.v: elbow, sleeve-push band, waist blouse, knee, ankle cuff

25_accessory_placement.v: WATCH on character-LEFT wrist (corrected); belt at natural waist

26_watch_position.v: LEFT dorsal wrist, ~1 hand-width above wrist crease
